ideation: This animation sequence aims to mimic the slow, deliberate movements of a turtle.  The robot will extend its arms forward and then slowly retract them, mirroring how a turtle might reach out and then pull its limbs back into its shell. The movement will be calm and measured, reflecting the turtle's peaceful nature.  The sequence will consist of four frames. Frame 1 will show the arms at rest. Frame 2 will show both arms extending forward. Frame 3 will show the arms halfway back. Frame 4 will show the arms back at rest.

frames.beat: arms rest, tucked in close like a shell
both arms slowly extend forward, reaching out
arms retract halfway, cautious and deliberate
arms pull back fully into the shell
